So let's start by understanding what a belief really is. A belief represents what you think and feel about the world and then how you actually view yourself as you move through the world and in the end it's all about certainty, meaning your level of confidence that something is definitely true. The more certain you are about something, the stronger your belief is about it and conversely the less certain you are about something, the weaker your belief. Now in essence who we are as people and how we operate in the world are dictated by the sum of all our beliefs. On the positive side we have what we call empowering beliefs which leads us to massive wealth and success. Then we have the disempowering beliefs which are called limiting beliefs that lead us to misery and poverty and hopefully to total absolute failure. The bad news is though is that at the end of the day as people we always end up getting held down by our lowest level limiting belief. Essentially it's the one at the bottom that stops us from being able to take advantage of all our other empowering beliefs. Let me give you an example here. You could have a Ferrari, a beautiful quarter million dollar racing machine that's as sleek as hell, Cherry Red chassis, 500 horsepower engine, 12 cylinders under the hood, 4 valves per cable going 250 miles an hour. If you have a governor on the engine stopping the flow of gas it ain't going over 55. That's what a limiting belief does to you. It stops you from charging for when you should and causes you to pull back when you shouldn't. The truth is that we all have them. In fact if you don't think you have a limiting belief then guess what? You just found your first limiting belief. We all have them. They were literally inserted into us by our parents back when we were kids and then got reinforced by our teachers, our friends, our enemies, the media and so on. For the most part our parents had our best interests at heart but they made some pretty huge mistakes along the way with some of the beliefs they inserted into us. Whether it was about us not being capable of greatness or money being the root of all evil or sales being manipulative. Those are just a few examples, some serious limiting beliefs that lots of people have out there just walking around with them. They sit just below the surface disguising themselves as the facts of life and they act as silent killers of success. Now in a few minutes here I'm going to take you through a very powerful process that will actually root out your limiting beliefs and replace them with empowering beliefs. To force that process, kind of like a mini workshop within this program and when we go through it I'm going to ask you to actively participate in the process. Now I know that for some of you these exercises are going to be a little bit uncomfortable or even seem weird but just trust me they're incredibly powerful and they'll have a massive impact on both your sales results and your personal life as well. I want you to really go for it and not hold back. I want you to get that result you're looking for and then once you do, once you have that limiting belief replaced by an empowering belief, you're going to be in great shape.
